title: Glow Berry Lantern
description: This mod adds a lantern made from glow berries. Nothing else.
body:
# This mod adds a lantern made from glow berries. Nothing else.

Ever wish you could make a lantern using glow berries but were frustrated when you found out you couldn't? 

**WELL NOW YOU CAN!**

As stated above, this mod adds a lantern made from glow berries. Nothing else.

The glow berry lantern functions exactly the same as a regular lantern.

# How do I craft it?

![A crafting example showing a single glow berry in the middle crafting slot surrounded by 8 iron nuggets](https://i.imgur.com/cJ1MbUd.png)


# What does it look like?

![A hanging Glow Berry Lantern on top of a non-hanging Glow Berry Lantern](https://i.imgur.com/eHg7N6f.png)


# Can I use this in my modpack?
Yes you can!
